title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACLAYON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 5342 / 62 OG No. 3, 6422 (September 5, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4408, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACLAYON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

The sitios of Tunga and Cambanac in the barrio of Laya, Municipality of Baclayon, Province of Bohol, are separated from said barrio and constituted into a distinct and independent barrio, to be known as the barrio of San Juan Buenaventura.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
